[[Ec Pand]] was a [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]] world that was located within the [[Ado sector/Legends|Ado sector]], and was one of the [[Induparan Crown Worlds]].

==History==
While fleeing from a rival house on Ec Pand aboard the [[Corvette/Legends|corvette]] ''[[Indupar Nova]]'', Lady [[Kalena]] and her handmaiden [[Missa]] were captured by the [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Urias Xhaxin]] of ''[[Free Lance]]''. Xhaxin held them at ransom for the highest bidder.
